easy: Single-action flow: fill form, click Register, done
Immediate feedback via redirect to dashboard on success
experience.would_recommend: Yes -- the signup flow is frictionless
experience.satisfaction_reason: Registration completed in one attempt with no errors.

verification_tasks.evidence: Dashboard re-rendered after F5 page refresh without redirect to /register; GET /api/user/me returned 200 again, confirming the httpOnly session cookie persists across full page reloads
Dashboard re-rendered after F5 page refresh without redirect to /register; GET /api/user/me returned 200 again, confirming the httpOnly session cookie persists across full page reloads
